widgets_values: Create new character, then click "generate preview" to see how it would look BEFORE running workflow.
Click **Download ALL** to download all models right in your comfyUI models directory. No need to restart, all loras would work right after downloading.

Set your custom poses.
You can share them in VNCCS Discord channel: https://discord.com/invite/9Dacp4wvQw
Don't forget to select your QWEN models here.
Resolution of generation (more is better but longer to gennerate)

Denoise - strengh of UpScale inpaint (more value - more changes)

Re select bbox model if you use linux

Model (Better model - more vram needed)

Resolution of Upscaled image (more is better but more VRAM used)

Tolerance: strength of removing main background color. (more tolerance - less bg leftovers but higher chance that some parts of image can be damaged.

Despill - outline around the character.

Strength - use 1

Kernel size - stroke thickness in pixels

Color - black (only stable option right now)

change character's pose. 
keep art style intact,

t-pose
looking at viewer

Describe the character and their key features (body shape, physical characteristics, clothing, items, accessories). Then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the character. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original character where appropriate.
